extraction.one_line_summary: GANNA Filippo won the opening ITT by 22 seconds over ALMEIDA João, establishing dominance expected of the world time trial champion.
tactical_patterns: ALMEIDA João set surprising benchmark pace 22 seconds behind winner, signaling unexpectedly strong GC form for Portuguese rider.
Astana suffered dual setback: LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel crashed 6km from finish, FUGLSANG Jakob posted poor time on same day.

rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: Held hot seat for extended period, only 22 seconds behind world champion suggests climbing GC threat with time trial defense
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Best among pure GC contenders, distanced rivals significantly though couldn't match Ganna's specialist pace
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: Posted 13:27 down on Almeida, middle-of-pack GC starter revealing expected time trial weakness
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: negative: Race-ending crash 6km from finish after hitting bump shows technical vulnerability in ITT conditions
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: negative: Poor opening ride compounds Astana's disastrous stage with Lopez crash, team depth immediately compromised
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: neutral: Mid-pack GC result on home roads, lost significant time to Thomas suggesting age affecting against-the-clock performance
